```{r}
    log_BNP_at_start + log_BNP_at_start5.5 + log_BNP_at_start7 +
    BNP_NT_Pro_at_start +
    log_BNP_NT_Pro_at_start + log_BNP_NT_Pro_at_start5 + #log_BNP_NT_Pro_at_start5.5 +
    sodium_at_start + sodium_at_start137,
  data = combined_df,
  weights = sweight, family = binomial)
mortality_modelE_linear
mortality_modelE_linearVCOV = vcovCL(mortality_modelE_linear, cluster = ~ PX_ID)

# calculate RRs with linear spline model

# 1. Bilirubin (Linear)
bili_rr_lin = cbind.data.frame(
  bilirubin_trans = bili_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,
          apply(data.frame(bili_range - min(bili_range), 
                           pmax(bili_range - 0.47, 0)), 1, function(row) {
                  getHR(mortality_modelE_linear,
                        vars=c("log_bili_at_start", "log_bili_at_start.47"),
                        comb=as.numeric(row),
                        cov=mortality_modelE_linearVCOV)}))
)

# 2. eGFR (Linear)
egfr_rr_lin = cbind.data.frame(
  egfr = egfr_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,
          apply(data.frame(egfr_range - min(egfr_range), 
                           pmax(egfr_range - 40, 0), 
                           pmax(egfr_range - 90, 0)), 1, function(row) {
                  getHR(mortality_modelE_linear,
                        vars=c("eGFR_at_start", "eGFR_at_start40", "eGFR_at_start90"),
                        comb=as.numeric(row),
                        cov=mortality_modelE_linearVCOV)}))
)

# 3. BNP (Linear - Non-NT subset)
bnp_rr_lin = cbind.data.frame(
  bnp_trans = bnp_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,
          apply(data.frame(bnp_range - min(bnp_range), 
                           pmax(bnp_range - 5.5, 0), 
                           pmax(bnp_range - 7, 0)), 1, function(row) {
                  getHR(mortality_modelE_linear,
                        vars=c("log_BNP_at_start", "log_BNP_at_start5.5", "log_BNP_at_start7"),
                        comb=as.numeric(row),
                        cov=mortality_modelE_linearVCOV)}))
)

# 4. NT-proBNP (Linear)
# no intercept for NT-proBNP for this plot; start at 0
bnp_nt_rr_lin = cbind.data.frame(
  bnp_nt_trans = bnp_nt_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,
          apply(data.frame(bnp_nt_range - min(bnp_nt_range), 
                           pmax(bnp_nt_range - 5, 0)), 1, function(row) {
                  getHR(mortality_modelE_linear,
                        vars=c("log_BNP_NT_Pro_at_start", 
                               "log_BNP_NT_Pro_at_start5"),
                        comb=row,
                        cov=mortality_modelE_linearVCOV)}))
)

# 5. Albumin (Linear)
alb_rr_lin = cbind.data.frame(
  albumin = alb_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,
          apply(data.frame(alb_range - min(alb_range), 
                           pmax(alb_range - 3.5, 0), 
                           pmax(alb_range - 4.25, 0)), 1, function(row) {
                  getHR(mortality_modelE_linear,
                        vars=c("albumin_at_start", "albumin_at_start3.5", "albumin_at_start4.25"),
                        comb=as.numeric(row),
                        cov=mortality_modelE_linearVCOV)}))
)

# 6. Sodium (Linear)
sod_rr_lin = cbind.data.frame(
  sodium = sod_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,
          apply(data.frame(sod_range - min(sod_range), 
                           pmax(sod_range - 137, 0)), 1, function(row) {
                  getHR(mortality_modelE_linear,
                        vars=c("sodium_at_start", "sodium_at_start137"),
                        comb=as.numeric(row),
                        cov=mortality_modelE_linearVCOV)}))
)

# plot them all together
ggplot(bind_rows(bili_rr %>% mutate(value=bilirubin_trans,lab="ln(Bilirubin)",model="Cubic"),
                 bili_rr_lin %>% mutate(value=bilirubin_trans,lab="ln(Bilirubin)",model="Linear"),
                 egfr_rr %>% mutate(value=egfr,lab="eGFR",model="Cubic"),
                 egfr_rr_lin %>% mutate(value=egfr,lab="eGFR",model="Linear"),
                 bnp_rr %>% mutate(value=bnp_trans,lab=case_when(
                   bnp_nt_pro==0 ~ "ln(BNP)",T ~ "ln(NT-proBNP)"),model="Cubic"),
                 bnp_rr_lin %>% mutate(value=bnp_trans,lab="ln(BNP)",model="Linear"),
                 bnp_nt_rr_lin %>% mutate(value=bnp_nt_trans,lab="ln(NT-proBNP)",model="Linear"),
                 alb_rr %>% mutate(value=albumin,lab="Albumin",model="Cubic"),
                 alb_rr_lin %>% mutate(value=albumin,lab="Albumin",model="Linear"),
                 sod_rr %>% mutate(value=sodium,lab="Sodium",model="Cubic"),
                 sod_rr_lin %>% mutate(value=sodium,lab="Sodium",model="Linear")),
       aes(x=value,y=hr, linetype=model, fill=model)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
  geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
                     breaks=2^((-3):6),limits=c(.125,8),
                     oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  facet_wrap(~lab,scales="free_x",nrow=2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d() + # direction=-1
  # scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,1,.2),limits=c(0,1),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  labs(x="Lab value",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)",
       fill="Spline",linetype="Spline") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=14))
ggsave("lab-coefs-by-splinetype.png",width=7.5,height=5,dpi=300)

# save mortality_modelE_linear
save(mortality_modelE_linear,file="mortality-modelE-linear.Rdata")

```





# Old

## Save final model and calculate robust standard errors
```{r}

mortality_model_full = glm(
  outcome ~ 
    factor(week_from_baseline) +
    ns(albumin_at_start,df=3) + 
    ns(log(bilirubin_at_start + 1),df=3)*durable_LVAD_at_start + 
    ns(eGFR_at_start,df=3)*durable_LVAD_at_start + 
    ns(log(BNP_at_start + 1),df=3)*BNP_NT_Pro_at_start*durable_LVAD_at_start + 
    ns(sodium_at_start,df=3) + 
    durable_LVAD_at_start + 
    short_mcs_ever_at_start +
    ns(lvad_years_at_start,df=3,knots=c(1,3)) + #,knots=c(6,8)) +
    ns(api_at_start,df=3) +
    ns(papi_at_start,df=3), 
  data = combined_df,
  weights = sweight, family = binomial)
AIC(mortality_model_full) # 62172.65

# look at model
summary(mortality_model_full)

# look at knots for LVAD years
attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(lvad_years_at_start, df = 3, knots = c(1, 3))`,"knots")
attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(lvad_years_at_start, df = 3, knots = c(1, 3))`,"Boundary.knots")

# make dataset of knots
knotsdat = lapply(1:length(colnames(mortality_model_full$model)),function(i) {
  coef_name = colnames(mortality_model_full$model)[i]
  inner.knots = attr((mortality_model_full$model)[[coef_name]],"knots")
  outer.knots = attr((mortality_model_full$model)[[coef_name]],"Boundary.knots")
  if (!is.null(inner.knots)) {
    return(data.frame(coef_name,knot1=outer.knots[1],knot2=inner.knots[1],
                    knot3=inner.knots[2],knot4=outer.knots[2]))
  }
})
knotsdat = do.call(rbind.data.frame,knotsdat)
write.csv(knotsdat,file="knots.csv",row.names=F)

# get robust SEs
mortality_model_full_VCOV = vcovCL(mortality_model_full, cluster = ~ PX_ID)
mortality_model_full_sum = do.call(rbind.data.frame,lapply(names(coef(mortality_model_full)),function(var_interest) {
  bind_cols(var=var_interest,getHR(mortality_model_full,vars=var_interest,cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV))
}))
mortality_model_full_sum
mortality_model_sum_coef = do.call(rbind.data.frame,lapply(names(coef(mortality_model_full)),function(var_interest) {
  bind_cols(var=var_interest,getHR(mortality_model_full,vars=var_interest,cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV,transform=F))
}))
mortality_model_sum_coef

# make supplemental table of coefficients
write.csv(mortality_model_sum_coef %>% rename(coef=xb) %>% mutate_at(.vars=vars(coef,se,lowCI,highCI),round,digits=3) %>% mutate(p=pval_format(p)),
          file="mortality-model-coefs.csv",row.names=F)
```

## Device hazard ratios: ECMO/surgical MCS, impella, IABP
```{r stmcs}
mortality_model_full_sum[mortality_model_full_sum$var=="short_mcs_ever_at_start",]

# model w/ impella and iabp
mort_impella_sum[mort_impella_sum$var=="short_mcs_ever_at_start",]
mort_impella_sum[mort_impella_sum$var=="impella_at_start",]
mort_impella_sum[mort_impella_sum$var=="iabp_at_start",]
```

## Durable LVAD hazard ratio at average lab values
```{r lvad}
# all the terms with durable LVAD
lvad_termnames = (names(coef(mortality_model_full)))[grepl("LVAD",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))]
lvad_termnames

## first get the splines for average lab values
knotsdat$coef_name
rownames(knotsdat) = c("albumin","bilirubin","eGFR","BNP","sodium","lvad_years","api","papi")
bili_avg_ns = ns(log(mean(combined_df$bilirubin_at_start)+1),3,knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["bilirubin",c("knot2","knot3")]),Boundary.knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["bilirubin",c("knot1","knot4")]))
egfr_avg_ns = ns(mean(combined_df$eGFR_at_start),3,knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["eGFR",c("knot2","knot3")]),Boundary.knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["eGFR",c("knot1","knot4")]))
bnp_avg_ns = ns(log(mean(combined_df$BNP_at_start[combined_df$BNP_NT_Pro==0])+1),3,knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["BNP",c("knot2","knot3")]),Boundary.knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["BNP",c("knot1","knot4")]))
sod_avg_ns = ns(mean(combined_df$sodium_at_start),3,knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["sodium",c("knot2","knot3")]),Boundary.knots=as.numeric(knotsdat["sodium",c("knot1","knot4")]))

# now get hazard ratio for LVAD (just started, years=0) at average lab values
lvad_termnames
getHR(mortality_model_full,
      vars=lvad_termnames,
      comb=c(1,bili_avg_ns,egfr_avg_ns,bnp_avg_ns,0,0,0,0),
      cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)

```

## Calculate predicted survival without transplant in training data
```{r}
# get predicted 6-week survival from training data, including all landmarks
pred_data = pred_data_fun(combined_df %>% filter(week_from_baseline==1))
summary(pred_data$prob_surv_6wk)
quantile(pred_data$prob_surv_6wk,probs=seq(0,.25,.05))

## SAVE MORTALITY MODEL
# also, function to calculate predicted 6-week survival
# also, model for numerator of stabilized weights
save(mortality_model_full,pred_data_fun,tx_model_first,mort_impella,file="mortality-model.RData")
save(combined_df,file="mortality-df.RData")

# summarize survival probability by status
with(pred_data,tapply(prob_surv_6wk,status_at_start,summary))

# plot distributions
library(ggforce)
ggplot(pred_data %>% filter(!is.na(status),!(status=="inactive")),
       aes(x = status_at_start, y = prob_surv_6wk)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha=.25) + 
  facet_zoom(y = prob_surv_6wk > .95) +  
  labs(x = "Status", y = "6-Week Survival Probability") +
  # title = "Figure 1: Box plots of predicted 6-week survival without transplant\nin adult heart candidates, 2019-2022, by status"
  theme_bw()
ggsave("pred-by-status-NEW.png",width=6,height=4)
```

## Calculate 6-week survival by time on LVAD
```{r}
# Map the 6-week probability to the status system
mortality_model_status = glm(
  outcome ~ status_at_start,
  data = combined_df,
  weights = weight, # in the absence of transplant
  family = binomial)
haz_dth_status = predict(mortality_model_status,newdata=data.frame(status_at_start=factor(1:6,levels=levels(combined_df$status_at_start))),type="response")
prob_surv_6wk_status = (1-haz_dth_status)^6
prob_surv_6wk_status

# how many LVAD years do you need to move from status 4 to status 3?

# set values for predicting
new_data_lvad <- data.frame(
  albumin_at_start = mean(pred_data$albumin_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1]),
  bilirubin_at_start = mean(pred_data$bilirubin_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1]),
  eGFR_at_start = mean(pred_data$eGFR_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1]),
  BNP_at_start = mean(pred_data$BNP_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1 & 
                                               pred_data$BNP_NT_Pro_at_start=="0"]),
  BNP_NT_Pro_at_start = "0",
  sodium_at_start = mean(pred_data$sodium_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1]),
  durable_LVAD_at_start = 1,
  short_mcs_ever_at_start = 0,
  cpo_at_start = mean(pred_data$cpo_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1]),
  api_at_start = mean(pred_data$api_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1]),
  papi_at_start = mean(pred_data$papi_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1]),
  lvad_years_at_start = seq(0,10,.2),
  impella_at_start=0,iabp_at_start=0
)
head(new_data_lvad)
pred_lvad <- pred_data_fun(new_data_lvad)

# make plot
## add distribution of years on LVAD
## add lines for Status 3 and 4
ggplot(pred_lvad, aes(x = lvad_years_at_start, y = prob_surv_6wk)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(
    #title = "Effect of LVAD years on 6-week survival probability in durable LVAD patients",
    x = "Years with LVAD",
    y = "6-Week Survival Probability"#survival without transplant"
  ) +
  theme_bw() + 
  coord_cartesian(xlim=c(0,10),
                  ylim=c(.97,1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,10,1)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=prob_surv_6wk_status["3"]) +
  geom_text(aes(4,prob_surv_6wk_status["3"],label="Status 3",vjust=-1)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=prob_surv_6wk_status["4"]) +
  geom_text(aes(4,prob_surv_6wk_status["4"],label="Status 4",vjust=-1))
ggsave("pred-by-LVADtime-NEW.png",width=6,height=4)

# distribution of time on LVAD in training data, including all landmarks
summary(pred_data$lvad_years_at_start[pred_data$durable_LVAD_at_start==1])
```


## Summarize spline effects by LVAD vs not
```{r}
## LVAD interactions with: bilirubin, BNP, eGFR

## bilirubin
bili_range = with(pred_data,seq(min(log(bilirubin_at_start+1)),max(log(bilirubin_at_start+1)),length.out=200))
bili_spl = ns(bili_range,df=3,
              knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(log(bilirubin_at_start + 1), df = 3)`,"knots"),
              Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(log(bilirubin_at_start + 1), df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
bili_rr = cbind.data.frame(
  bilirubin_trans = rep(bili_range,2),
  durable_lvad = c(rep(0,length(bili_range)),rep(1,length(bili_range))),
  rbind.data.frame(
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(bili_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("bili",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
                  comb=row,
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})),
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(bili_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("bili",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))],
                  comb=rep(row,2),
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})))) %>%
  mutate(bilirubin=exp(bilirubin_trans)-1)
# ggplot(bili_rr %>% mutate(durable_lvad=factor(durable_lvad)),
#        aes(x=exp(bilirubin_trans)-1,y=hr,linetype=durable_lvad,color=durable_lvad,fill=durable_lvad)) +
#   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
#   geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
#   scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
#                      breaks=c(.25,.5,1,2,4,8),limits=c(.25,8),
#                      oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,1,.2),limits=c(0,1),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   labs(x="Bilirubin",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)",
#        linetype="Durable LVAD",color="Durable LVAD",fill="Durable LVAD") +
#   theme_bw() +
#   theme(text=element_text(size=14))

## eGFR
egfr_range = with(pred_data,seq(min(eGFR_at_start),max(eGFR_at_start),length.out=200))
egfr_spl = ns(egfr_range,df=3,
              knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(eGFR_at_start, df = 3)`,"knots"),
              Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(eGFR_at_start, df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
egfr_rr = cbind.data.frame(
  egfr = rep(egfr_range,2),
  durable_lvad = c(rep(0,length(egfr_range)),rep(1,length(egfr_range))),
  rbind.data.frame(
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(egfr_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("eGFR",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
                  comb=row,
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})),
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(egfr_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("eGFR",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))],
                  comb=rep(row,2),
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)}))))
# ggplot(egfr_rr %>% mutate(durable_lvad=factor(durable_lvad)),
#        aes(x=egfr,y=hr,linetype=durable_lvad,color=durable_lvad,fill=durable_lvad)) +
#   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
#   geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
#   scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
#                      breaks=c(.25,.5,1,2,4,8),limits=c(.25,8),
#                      oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,120,20),limits=c(0,120),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   labs(x="eGFR",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)",
#        linetype="Durable LVAD",color="Durable LVAD",fill="Durable LVAD") +
#   theme_bw() +
#   theme(text=element_text(size=14))

# sodium
sod_range = with(pred_data,seq(min(sodium_at_start),max(sodium_at_start),length.out=200))
sod_spl = ns(sod_range,df=3,
              knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(sodium_at_start, df = 3)`,"knots"),
              Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(sodium_at_start, df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
sod_rr = cbind.data.frame(
  sodium = rep(sod_range,2),
  durable_lvad = c(rep(0,length(sod_range)),rep(1,length(sod_range))),
  rbind.data.frame(
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(sod_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("sodium",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
                  comb=row,
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})),
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(sod_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("sodium",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))],
                  comb=row,#rep(row,2),
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)}))))
# ggplot(sod_rr %>% mutate(durable_lvad=factor(durable_lvad)),
#        aes(x=sodium,y=hr,linetype=durable_lvad,color=durable_lvad,fill=durable_lvad)) +
#   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
#   geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
#   # scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
#   #                    breaks=2^(-8:1),limits=c(.0005,2),
#   #                    oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   # scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(100,200,20),limits=c(100,200),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   labs(x="Sodium",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)",
#        linetype="Durable LVAD",color="Durable LVAD",fill="Durable LVAD") +
#   theme_bw() +
#   theme(text=element_text(size=14))

## albumin
alb_range = with(pred_data,seq(min(albumin_at_start),max(albumin_at_start),length.out=200))
alb_spl = ns(alb_range,df=3,
              knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(albumin_at_start, df = 3)`,"knots"),
              Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(albumin_at_start, df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
alb_rr = cbind.data.frame(
  albumin = rep(alb_range,2),
  durable_lvad = c(rep(0,length(alb_range)),rep(1,length(alb_range))),
  rbind.data.frame(
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(alb_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("albumin",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
                  comb=row,
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})),
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(alb_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("albumin",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))],
                  comb=row,#rep(row,2),
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)}))))
# ggplot(alb_rr %>% mutate(durable_lvad=factor(durable_lvad)),
#        aes(x=albumin,y=hr,linetype=durable_lvad,color=durable_lvad,fill=durable_lvad)) +
#   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
#   geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
#   scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
#                      breaks=c(.125/2,.125,.25,.5,1,2),limits=c(.01,2),
#                      oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   # scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(100,200,20),limits=c(100,200),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
#   labs(x="Albumin",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)",
#        linetype="Durable LVAD",color="Durable LVAD",fill="Durable LVAD") +
#   theme_bw() +
#   theme(text=element_text(size=14))

# BNP
bnp_range = with(pred_data %>% filter(BNP_NT_Pro_at_start==0),
                  seq(min(log(BNP_at_start+1)),max(log(BNP_at_start+1)),length.out=200))
bnp_nt_range = with(pred_data %>% filter(BNP_NT_Pro_at_start==1),
                  seq(min(log(BNP_at_start+1)),max(log(BNP_at_start+1)),length.out=200))
bnp_spl = ns(c(bnp_range,bnp_nt_range),df=3,
              knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(log(BNP_at_start + 1), df = 3)`,"knots"),
              Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(log(BNP_at_start + 1), df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
bnp_rr = cbind.data.frame(
  bnp_trans = rep(c(bnp_range,bnp_nt_range),2),
  bnp_nt_pro = rep(c(rep(0,length(bnp_range)),rep(1,length(bnp_nt_range))),2),
  durable_lvad = c(rep(0,length(c(bnp_range,bnp_nt_range))),rep(1,length(c(bnp_range,bnp_nt_range)))),
  rbind.data.frame(
    # BNP_NT_Pro=0, LVAD=0
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(bnp_spl[1:200,],1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("BNP",names(coef(mortality_model_full))) & !grepl("BNP_NT",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
                  comb=row,
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})),
    # BNP_NT_Pro=1, LVAD=0
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(bnp_spl[201:400,],1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("BNP",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:7],
                  comb=c(row,1,row),
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})),
    # BNP_NT_Pro=0, LVAD=1
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(bnp_spl[1:200,],1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("BNP",names(coef(mortality_model_full))) & !grepl("BNP_NT",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))],
                  comb=rep(row,2),
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})),
    # BNP_NT_Pro=1, LVAD=1
    do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(bnp_spl[201:400,],1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("BNP",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))],
                  comb=rep(c(row,1,row),2),
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)}))
    )) %>%
  mutate(bnp=exp(bnp_trans)-1)
ggplot(bnp_rr %>% mutate(durable_lvad=factor(durable_lvad)),
       aes(x=bnp_trans,y=hr,linetype=durable_lvad,color=durable_lvad,fill=durable_lvad)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
  geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
                     # breaks=c(.25,.5,1,2,4,8),
                     #limits=c(.3,200),
                     oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  facet_grid(~bnp_nt_pro,scales="free_x") +
  # scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,1,.2),limits=c(0,1),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  labs(x="BNP",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)",
       linetype="Durable LVAD",color="Durable LVAD",fill="Durable LVAD") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=14))

# plot them all together
ggplot(bind_rows(bili_rr %>% mutate(value=bilirubin_trans,lab="ln(Bilirubin)"),
                 egfr_rr %>% mutate(value=egfr,lab="eGFR"),
                 bnp_rr %>% mutate(value=bnp_trans,lab=case_when(
                   bnp_nt_pro==0 ~ "ln(BNP)",T ~ "ln(BNP NT Pro)")),
                 alb_rr %>% mutate(value=albumin,lab="Albumin"),
                 sod_rr %>% mutate(value=sodium,lab="Sodium")) %>%
         mutate(durable_lvad=factor(durable_lvad,levels=c(0,1),labels=c("No","Yes"))),
       aes(x=value,y=hr,linetype=durable_lvad,fill=durable_lvad)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
  geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
                     breaks=2^((-3):6),limits=c(.125/2,32),
                     oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  facet_wrap(~lab,scales="free_x",nrow=2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d() +
  # scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,1,.2),limits=c(0,1),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  labs(x="Lab value",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)",
       linetype="Durable LVAD",color="Durable LVAD",fill="Durable LVAD") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=14))
ggsave("lab-coefs-by-lvad-NEW.png",width=7.5,height=5,dpi=300)




```


## Summarize hemodynamic effects
```{r}

## api
api_range = with(pred_data,seq(min(api_at_start),max(api_at_start),length.out=200))
api_spl = ns(api_range,df=3,
              knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(api_at_start, df = 3)`,"knots"),
              Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(api_at_start, df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
api_rr = cbind.data.frame(
  api = api_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(api_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("api",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
                  comb=row,
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})))

## papi
papi_range = with(pred_data,seq(min(papi_at_start),quantile(papi_at_start,.95),length.out=200))
papi_spl = ns(papi_range,df=3,
              knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(papi_at_start, df = 3)`,"knots"),
              Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(papi_at_start, df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
papi_rr = cbind.data.frame(
  papi = papi_range,
  do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(papi_spl,1,function(row) {
                getHR(mortality_model_full,
                  vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("papi",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
                  comb=row,
                  cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})))

## cpo
# cpo_range = with(pred_data,seq(min(cpo_at_start),quantile(cpo_at_start,.99),length.out=200))
# cpo_spl = ns(cpo_range,df=3,
#               knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(cpo_at_start, df = 3)`,"knots"),
#               Boundary.knots=attr(mortality_model_full$model$`ns(cpo_at_start, df = 3)`,"Boundary.knots"))
# cpo_rr = cbind.data.frame(
#   cpo = cpo_range,
#   do.call(rbind.data.frame,apply(cpo_spl,1,function(row) {
#                 getHR(mortality_model_full,
#                   vars=names(coef(mortality_model_full))[grepl("cpo",names(coef(mortality_model_full)))][1:3],
#                   comb=row,
#                   cov=mortality_model_full_VCOV)})))

# make the plot
ggplot(bind_rows(api_rr %>% rename(value=api) %>% mutate(hemo="API"),
                 papi_rr %>% rename(value=papi) %>% mutate(hemo="PAPi")) %>%
         mutate(hemo=factor(hemo,levels=c("API","PAPi"))),
       aes(x=value,y=hr)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lowCI, ymax = highCI),alpha=.5) +
  geom_line(color="black",linewidth=.75) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype=2) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans='log2',minor_breaks=NULL,
                     breaks=c(.25,.5,1,1.5,2,4,8),
                     limits=c(.25,2),
                     oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  facet_grid(~hemo,scales="free") +
  # scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,1,.2),limits=c(0,1),oob = scales::rescale_none) +
  labs(x="Pulsatility index value",y="Adjusted hazard ratio (95% CI)") +
       # linetype="Durable LVAD",color="Durable LVAD",fill="Durable LVAD") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=14))
ggsave("hemo-coefs-NEW.png",width=6,height=4)
```


## Forest plot
```{r,eval=F}
# Extract coefficients and confidence intervals
coef1 <- summary(mortality_model_no_weights)$coefficients
coef2 <- summary(uscrs_model)$coefficients


# Create data frames with the coefficients and confidence intervals
df1 <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coef1),
  estimate = coef1[, "Estimate"],
  conf.low = coef1[, "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef1[, "Std. Error"],
  conf.high = coef1[, "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef1[, "Std. Error"],
  model = "Model without Weights"
)

# Same terms as US-CRS + hemodynamics
df2 <- data.frame(
  term = setdiff(rownames(coef1), c("papi_at_start", "cpo_at_start", "api_at_start")),
  estimate = coef2[, "Estimate"],
  conf.low = coef2[, "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coef2[, "Std. Error"],
  conf.high = coef2[, "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coef2[, "Std. Error"],
  model = "USCRS 1.0"
)

df1 <- df1[df1$term != "(Intercept)", ]
df2 <- df2[df2$term != "(Intercept)", ]

# Combine the two data frames
forest_df <- rbind(df1, df2)

coef2
df2
forest_df
class(df_intervals$BNP_NT_Pro)
setdiff(rownames(coef1), c("papi_at_start", "cpo_at_start", "api_at_start"))

# Rename and reorder variables
new_names <- c("sodium_at_start" = "Sodium", "short_mcs_ever_at_start" = "Short-term MCS", "papi_at_start" = "PAPI", "log(BNP_at_start + 1):BNP_NT_Pro_at_start0" = "Log BNP, Regular BNP", "log(BNP_at_start + 1):BNP_NT_Pro_at_start1" = "Log BNP, NT-proBNP", "log(bilirubin_at_start + 1)" = "Log Bilirubin", "eGFR_at_start" = "eGFR", "durable_LVAD_at_start" = "Durable LVAD", "cpo_at_start" = "CPO", "api_at_start" = "API", "albumin_at_start" = "Albumin" )
term_order <- c("PAPI", "API", "CPO", "Durable LVAD", "Sodium", "Albumin", "Log BNP, NT-proBNP", "Log BNP, Regular BNP", "eGFR", "Log Bilirubin", "Short-term MCS")
forest_df

forest_df <- forest_df %>%
  mutate(term = recode(term, !!!new_names))
forest_df <- forest_df %>%
  mutate(term = factor(term, levels = term_order))# Create the forest plot
ggplot(forest_df, aes(x = estimate, y = term, color = model)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), height = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Coefficient Estimate", y = "Term", title = "Model Coefficients") +
  theme_minimal()

new_names
```
